answer_pattern.opening: Our standard rate is 15% plus VAT of gross bookings.
key_points: This is after all costs — platform fees, cleaning, supplies
At that rate on your projected £X gross, your net is £Y
If you'd like to lock in a preferential rate of 13%, I can offer that if you sign by [date]
answer_pattern.closing: The management fee is the only thing we charge — no hidden setup fees, no photography costs, no onboarding charges.
answer_pattern.what_not_to_say: Don't lead with the percentage without immediately showing the net figure. Percentages are abstract; £ amounts are concrete.

questions.canonical_trigger: What notice period do I need to give?
trigger_variants: How long am I tied in for?
Can I exit if it's not working?

answer_pattern.opening: 6-month minimum term, then 3 months notice at any point after that.
key_points: The earliest exit window is 9 months in — but this is yours whenever you want it
In practice, no host has exercised the 3-month notice because the income works
We review your income at 60 days — you'll know by then if it's performing as expected
answer_pattern.closing: It's a long enough commitment to properly launch your listing — short enough that you're not stuck.
answer_pattern.what_not_to_say: Don't say 'only 6 months' — minimising the commitment creates distrust.

questions.canonical_trigger: What platforms do you list on?

answer_pattern.opening: We focus on three platforms: Airbnb, Booking.com, and our own direct booking site.
key_points: Direct booking is ~26% of our portfolio income — reduces platform dependency
We use Airbnb as the primary review builder in the first 6 months
We abandoned other platforms to concentrate reviews — spreading across 10 platforms dilutes your star rating
answer_pattern.closing: Three platforms, done properly, outperforms ten platforms done casually.
answer_pattern.what_not_to_say: Don't get defensive about not using VRBO. Explain the strategic choice.

questions.canonical_trigger: How long before I start earning?
trigger_variants: How quickly can we go live?
When will I get my first booking?

answer_pattern.opening: From agreement to go-live is typically 3 weeks.
key_points: Week 1: photographer, cleaner inspection, snagging list
Week 2: listing creation, pricing strategy, first booking window opens
answer_pattern.closing: If you signed today, you could have your first guest by [date 3 weeks from now].
answer_pattern.what_not_to_say: Don't say 'it depends' without following up with the specifics.
